topics: Introduction to Quantity Surveying: Basic Principles
Role and Responsibilities of Quantity Surveyor at Various Stages of Construction; Estimate Details Required

Contract Documents (Brief Description); Bill of Quantity – Typical Format and Use; Items of Works – Identifying Various Items of Work from Drawings; Units of Measurement of Various Materials and Works (focus on RCC Residential Building); General Rules and Methods of Measurement with Reference to Indian Standard Specifications IS 1200

Introduction to the Use of CPWD Schedule of Rates as per Latest DSR and Analysis of Rates as per Latest DAR; Specifications – General Specification of All Items of a Residential Building; Detailed Specifications (CPWD Specifications) of Major Items of Work like Earthwork Excavation in Foundation
Finishing of Building Work; Analysis of Rates for Earthwork in Foundation
Flooring with Reference to Latest DSR and Latest DAR (Data should be given)

Detailed Estimate – Preparation of Detailed Measurement using Centre Line Method and Short Wall-Long Wall (Separate Wall) Method for RCC Single-Storeyed Building (Flat Roof) including Stair Cabin – Residential/Office/School Building; BOQ Preparation of a Single-Storeyed RCC Building Work; Material Quantity Calculation of the Items of Work (Rubble)
Plastering in Detailed Estimate Prepared for Building Work (Data for Unit Quantity should be provided from DAR); Bar Bending Schedule – Preparation of BBS of RCC Beams
Retaining Wall; Road Estimation – Estimation of Earthwork from Longitudinal Section for Metaled Road; Estimation of Sanitary and Water Supply Work – Water Tank
Manhole (No Detailed Estimate Needed – Concept of Item of Work
Its General Specification and Unit of Measurement); Introduction to Software Tools for Quantity Surveying
Kinds of Values; Income – Gross Income
Obsolescence; Freehold and Leasehold Properties; Methods of Calculating Depreciation – Straight Line Method, Constant Percentage Method
Sinking Fund Method and Quantity Survey Method; Methods of Valuation – Rental Method
Depreciation Method; Valuation of Land (Brief Description Only)
